title: What song is Mari singing
wikitext:
[]: What song is Mari singing? [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Ark » Wed Aug 12, 2009 5:50 pm Does anyone know what song Mari is singing at the beginning?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 12, 2009 5:58 pm I haven't seen it, but I shall use my psychic powers to guess. Three Steps Foward, Two Steps Back . Though, it would be awesome if it were Komm Susser Tod.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Aug 12, 2009 6:02 pm Reichu wrote: マリ「しあわっせはーあるいってこないだーからあるいってゆっくんだねーん 　　　いっちにっちいっぽみーかでさんぽ　さーんぽすすんでにっほさっがるー 　　　じーんせいはっわんつー！ぱんち・・・ Mari: (singing) ♪　Happiness doesn't walk to me, because I'm walking to it. One day, one step. Three steps in three days. Three steps forward, two steps back. Life's a one-two punch... ♪ [color=blue][Mari's singing "The 356-Step March" by Kiyoko Suizenji . (Thanks for sending me the song, SSD. Made things a lot easier.) The part Mari sings goes: Shiawase wa aruite konai, dakara aruite yuku 'n da ne Ichinichi, ippo. Mikka de sanpo. Sanpo susunde, niho sagaru Jinsei wa, one-two-panchi...

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Thu Aug 13, 2009 6:06 am So is it like a children's song or something? It kind of reminded me of that one that the Tachikoma's sing at the end of the second series of Ghost in the shell.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Aug 13, 2009 8:57 am IMO, that song illustrates one of the main themes of Rebuild. "3 steps forward, 2 steps back". Facing trials, but still going forward by a little. Also, it reflects on Mari's plucky nature.

[]: The same song is present in Cutie Honey as well             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 13, 2010 8:15 pm While talking with ath he pointed out that Cutie Honey (in Anno's live action movie) sings the same song that Mari is singing at the beginning of the Rebuild 2.22; has it been already noticed by anyone else? Does anyone know if this song is actually a popular tune, I never heard anything about it but it seems that Anno liked it a lot. Mediafire link to the song from Cutie Honey - Ripped by ath , thanks. @admin&mods: I'm posting here since I found this thread while searching for similar threads, split and merge if it's necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 13, 2010 8:25 pm Ark wrote: So is it like a children's song or something?

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Nov 13, 2010 10:48 pm Everytime I play that portion I get amused. Here's a bit on Kiyoko Suizenji : Suizenji-san sings an Enka style which sounds a bit "post-war" to me. I can't tell how old these songs really are, but they don't sound like they are from the 90's. Also, she uses rhythm strongly, and in fact, some of her songs sound like rousing marches, almost. Her voice sometimes punches out stressed notes very hard. I found her singing a little hard to get used to, though I really liked two songs on this album. I get the impression that her songs are meant for sing-along. Notice the fist she holds in the picture on the album. In performance, her songs are more in the style of the "work song", a variety of enka which is seemingly related to work songs done in the country. Such songs were intended to be rousing and energizing.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 13, 2010 11:25 pm Somehow I didn't read Ornette's message quoting Reichu... sorry for my idiocy. EDIT: soul.assasin wrote: OBTW, the link to the Youtube clip has been destroyed due to copyright infringement.

[]: Re: The same song is present in Cutie Honey as well             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Nov 14, 2010 3:36 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: While talking with ath he pointed out that Cutie Honey (in Anno's live action movie) sings the same song that Mari is singing at the beginning of the Rebuild 2.22; has it been already noticed by anyone else?
